name: Urban Golf Suites
address: 3100 NW Boca Raton Blvd #101, Boca Raton, FL 33431
about: Urban Golf Suites is a golf simulator venue that offers a modern and convenient experience for golfers. The venue is equipped with multiple simulator bays and accepts various payment methods including major credit cards and digital wallets. It provides a flexible environment for both casual play and serious practice, catering to individuals and groups looking for an indoor golf experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Flexible for groups and solo players

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar with cocktails and beer

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own clubs or rent them at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not allowed, but the venue offers a full kitchen and bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically 1-2 hours depending on the simulator software and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Urban Golf Suites is suitable for families and children.
